2026-05-07ESDCDepartment of Employment and Social Development ActAppointment of a member of the Employment Insurance Board of AppealAppointment of Maija Pluto of Toronto, Ontario, to be a member of the Employment Insurance Board of Appeal, to hold office during pleasure on a part-time basis for a term of four years.N/A
act: Department of Employment and Social Development Act
subject: Appointment of a member of the Employment Insurance Board of Appeal
precis: Appointment of Maija Pluto of Toronto, Ontario, to be a member of the Employment Insurance Board of Appeal, to hold office during pleasure on a part-time basis for a term of four years.
